moments.title: British Grand Prix Finale
moments.blurb: The high-octane British Grand Prix at Silverstone concludes this weekend, with the final race of the Formula 1 event taking place on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Race Day Excitement
angles.copy: Who are you backing for glory at Silverstone this Sunday? The British Grand Prix is set for a thrilling finale!

angles.name: Weekend of Speed
angles.copy: Engines roaring all weekend! The British Grand Prix wraps up Sunday – catch all the action.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Ongoing
moments.blurb: The world-famous Wimbledon Championships continue at the All England Club, with top tennis action running until July 12th.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are out, the serves are in! Wimbledon is in full swing, who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Centre Court Drama
angles.copy: More incredible tennis from Wimbledon today. Don't miss a minute of the action as the tournament progresses.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup culminates with the highly anticipated final match taking place this Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: World Cup Decider
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final is on Sunday. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Cricket's Big Day
angles.copy: Get ready for a massive Sunday of cricket as the Women's T20 World Cup concludes. Fingers crossed for a UK win!

moments.title: UK Heatwave incoming
moments.blurb: High pressure is set to bring very warm and potentially hot conditions across much of the UK, especially Southern and Eastern England, over the next week, with temperatures reaching the low 30s Celsius.

angles.name: Summer Heat Alert
angles.copy: Sun's out, temps are rising! Get ready for a very warm week across the UK, with the mercury hitting the low 30s in some areas. Stay hydrated!

angles.name: Hot Spell Ahead
angles.copy: Dig out the shorts! A hot spell is on the way for much of the UK over the next week. Perfect for some outdoor fun (responsibly, of course).

angles.name: Devon Sunshine
angles.copy: Radio Exe listeners, get ready for some glorious sunshine and rising temperatures over the next few days! Time to hit the beach?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's collaboration 'Rein Me In' holds the UK Official Singles Chart #1 for a 15th non-consecutive week, making chart history.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is #1 for an incredible 15th week. Have you streamed it today?

angles.name: Making History
angles.copy: 15 weeks at #1! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are setting records with 'Rein Me In'. A modern classic in the making?

moments.title: New Music Friday Releases
moments.blurb: Today's New Music Friday brings fresh releases, including Deep Purple's new album 'Splat!', Becky Hill's single 'what do i have to do?', and mary in the junkyard's debut album 'Role Model Hermit'.

angles.name: Fresh Tracks
angles.copy: New Music Friday is here! What's first on your playlist? We're diving into Deep Purple, Becky Hill, and mary in the junkyard.

angles.name: Album Drops
angles.copy: Deep Purple just dropped 'Splat!' and mary in the junkyard released their debut 'Role Model Hermit'. Get listening!

moments.title: Shane Lynch turns 50
moments.blurb: Shane Lynch, a key member of the iconic 90s Irish boyband Boyzone, celebrates his 50th birthday today.

angles.name: Boyzone at 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th birthday to Boyzone's Shane Lynch! What's your favourite Boyzone track to celebrate?

angles.name: 90s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Shane Lynch turning 50 today! He brought us so many hits with Boyzone. Rewind to the 90s with us!

moments.title: Vince Clarke's 66th Birthday
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his foundational work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 today.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 66th birthday to the incredible Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his influence is undeniable.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrate Vince Clarke's 66th today by cranking up some Yazoo or Erasure! What's your favourite track he's produced?

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th, continuing his annual 'Peace & Love' tradition.

angles.name: Peace & Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Get ready to spread some Peace & Love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: The one and only Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday next week. An absolute icon of music history!

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for her distinctive folk-inspired sound and hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner,' celebrates her 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 67th birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega on July 11th! 'Luka' or 'Tom's Diner' – which is your favourite?

angles.name: Distinctive Sound
angles.copy: Suzanne Vega's unique voice has graced our airwaves for decades. Celebrate her 67th birthday next week with her timeless tracks.

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, a world-renowned celebration of motorsport and car culture, takes place from July 9th to 12th.

angles.name: Petrolhead Paradise
angles.copy: Start your engines! Goodwood Festival of Speed kicks off next week – a must for any car enthusiast.

angles.name: Speed Thrills
angles.copy: From classic cars to future tech, Goodwood Festival of Speed has it all. Get ready for some serious speed from July 9-12!

moments.title: Lytham Festival Final Weekend
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, five days of live music on the Lancashire coast, draws to a close this weekend with its final performances on Sunday, July 5th.

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: It's the last chance to catch Lytham Festival this weekend! Who's heading to the Lancashire coast for the final acts?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Closing out a fantastic week of music! Lytham Festival wraps up Sunday – what's been your highlight?

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival brings a diverse lineup of groundbreaking UK and international acts to Moseley Park from July 10th to 12th.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Get ready, Birmingham! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival hits Moseley Park next weekend. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Funk & Soul Weekend
angles.copy: Bringing the best of jazz, funk, and soul to Birmingham from July 10-12. Grab your tickets for a weekend of incredible music!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival London
moments.blurb: The Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace in London on July 11th, promising a day of music, comedy, and arts with a stunning view over the city.

angles.name: Ally Pally Festival
angles.copy: Londoners, mark your calendars! Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace on July 11th. Music, comedy, and views for days!

angles.name: Summer Festival Fun
angles.copy: One day, endless entertainment! Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally is shaping up to be a summer highlight. Who's in?
